//: Canonical task ledger. The architect EMITS this from /plan; the executor UPDATES it every turn; the reviewer/tester READ it. It is the single source of truth that survives context loss. Copy to ./TASK.json at task start.
goal: one sentence: the outcome that means this is done
invariants: things that must remain TRUE throughout (e.g. 'public API of Foo unchanged')
forbidden_files: files/globs the executor must NOT modify (e.g. '**/*.test.*' while implementing)
acceptance_tests: exact commands/test names that prove the whole task is done

steps.verify: the exact check that proves THIS step works

rollback: last known-green commit SHA / how to revert
